UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF'S MTN TO COMPEL DEFT'S RESPONSES TO REQ FOR ADMISSIONS. AFTER HEARING THE ORAL ARGUMENTS, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANT AND DENY IN PART. GRANT ADMISSIONS RE SAN FRANCISCO PROPERTY ONLY. DENY ADMISSIONS RE SAN MATEO COUNTY. DENY SANCTIONS. DEFENDANT ISAC MARCHASIN'S VERIFIED RESPONSES ARE DUE TO PLAINTIFF BY 4/2/13 AT 5:00PM. COURT DENIES THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO MAKE THE INFORMATION IN THE CASE CONFIDENTIAL. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Isac Marchasin'S Answers To Pltf'S Deposition Questions Regarding Ownership Of His Real Estate Interest And Follow-Up Questions
Off Calendar Apr-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Catherine Wiederhold (415-333-9733) appearing for Merinda Kephart & Graham Cornelius, plaintiffs and moving parties / Andrea Reyna Murphy (415-278-9400) for Isac Marchasin, defendant and opposing party

ARGUED - After clarifying the tentative ruling and hearing the oral arguments, the Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF MERINDA KEPHART and CORNELIUS GRAHAM's Motion For Order Compelling Isac Marchasin'S Answers To Plaintiff'S Deposition Questions Regarding Ownership Of His Real Estate Interest And Follow-Up Questions is Granted. (See scanned order for details). Order is signed in open court. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Mtn To Compel Deft'S Responses To Req For Admissions
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Grossman (415-533-0735), for Merinda Kephart and Cornelius Graham, plaintiff and moving parties / Andrea Reyna Murphy (415-278-9400) for Isac Marchasin, defendant and opposing party

HEARING - After hearing the oral arguments, Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Grant and Deny in part. Grant admissions re San Francisco property only. Deny admissions re San Mateo County. Deny sanctions. Defendant Isac Marchasin's verified responses are due to plaintiff by 4/2/13 at 5:00pm. Court denies the defendant's request to make the information in the case confidential. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
